## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`go test ./...`)
- [ ] Code follows project conventions (`gofmt`, `go vet`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (for user-facing changes)
- [ ] Commit messages follow the convention (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)

- [ ] Bug fix

- [ ] New driver

- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Build / CI
